app_release_notes: v0.14.8 - New Range Session & DOPE screen. Enter the elevation and wind you dialed at each distance in a clean Loadscope form (Workbook menu -> Range Session & DOPE) - it shows only your scope's unit (Mil or MOA), saves into your workbook, and the click-count columns keep auto-filling. Second step of bringing Loadscope's clean format to the working app. Includes all prior 0.14.x fixes.
